title: Optimal Tool Call-controlled Policy Optimization for Tool-Integrated Reasoning

defines.name: OTC-PO
defines.definition: A reinforcement-learning framework that optimizes tool-integrated reasoning with rewards that balance answer correctness and minimal tool usage.

defines.name: OTC-PPO
defines.definition: An instantiation of OTC-PO using Proximal Policy Optimization.

defines.name: OTC-GRPO
defines.definition: An instantiation of OTC-PO using Group Relative Preference Optimization.

problem: Existing RL methods for tool-integrated reasoning optimize final correctness but ignore tool-use efficiency, leading to excessive tool calling and cognitive offloading.
